## Tags
table, rows, columns, data, blocks, plot, land, geometry, measure, size, width, height, distance, surface area, square meter, acre

## Categories
text, layout, math

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/grid-2x2-x)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Grid2x2X;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Grid2x2X { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
